title: AI agents can manage your passwords. Should we let them? Plus: The biggest Patch Tuesday ever.
summary: IBM Security Intelligence podcast discusses whether AI agents should be trusted to detect compromised passwords and change them automatically, examines Microsoft's June 2026 Patch Tuesday covering over 200 CVEs as a potential watershed moment in vulnerability management, and explores the trend of C-suite executives accepting greater cyber risk in pursuit of innovation.
writeup: This IBM Security Intelligence podcast episode weighs whether AI agents should be trusted to detect compromised passwords and change them automatically, a question that bears on how much autonomous action security teams cede to agents. It also examines Microsoft's June 2026 Patch Tuesday, which covers more than 200 CVEs and is framed as a potential watershed moment in vulnerability management. The episode further explores a trend of C-suite executives accepting greater cyber risk in the pursuit of innovation.
